Merge Data from Regression Equation on Standard Curve with Absorbance Data (samples)

Source: R/abs_to_conc.R
reg_join_abs.Rd

Merge Data from Regression Equation on Standard Curve with Absorbance Data (samples)

Usage

reg_join_abs(lm_table, abs_data, target_sp = "N")

Arguments

lm_table

A tibble with linear model data (as generated by lm_std_curve()). Must contain columns plate_id, slope, adj_r_squared, lm_p

abs_data

Blank-corrected absorbance data, in a similar format to tidy_plates, but containing only sample wells, no empty wells, standard curve wells or extractant wells

target_sp

Defaults to "N", the target compound to convert to

Value

A tibble joining linear model data with absorbance data

Examples

lm_table <- lm_output$lm_data
sample_data <- sample_corrected
reg_join_abs(lm_table, sample_data, target_sp = "N")
#> # A tibble: 528 × 11
#>    dataset plate_id map   well_id abs_corrected std_sp target_sp std_unit  slope
#>    <chr>   <chr>    <chr> <chr>           <dbl> <chr>  <chr>     <chr>     <dbl>
#>  1 Nmin    NO3_1F1  81_t… A2            0.0312  NO3    N         mg NO3-… 0.0189
#>  2 Nmin    NO3_1F1  81_t… A2            0.0312  NO3    N         mg NO3-… 0.0179
#>  3 Nmin    NO3_1F2  97_t… A2           -0.00975 NO3    N         mg NO3-… 0.0178
#>  4 Nmin    NO3_1F2  97_t… A2           -0.00975 NO3    N         mg NO3-… 0.0190
#>  5 Nmin    NO3_1F3  89_t… A2            0.0104  NO3    N         mg NO3-… 0.0186
#>  6 Nmin    NO3_1F3  89_t… A2            0.0104  NO3    N         mg NO3-… 0.0184
#>  7 Nmin    NO3_1F4  81_t… A2            0.0437  NO3    N         mg NO3-… 0.0178
#>  8 Nmin    NO3_1F4  81_t… A2            0.0437  NO3    N         mg NO3-… 0.0188
#>  9 Nmin    NO3_1F5  Std_… A2            0.0832  NO3    N         mg NO3-… 0.0194
#> 10 Nmin    NO3_1F5  Std_… A2            0.0832  NO3    N         mg NO3-… 0.0185
#> # ℹ 518 more rows
#> # ℹ 2 more variables: adj_r_squared <dbl>, lm_p <dbl>
